query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Colonial America and Independence', 'Explore colonial America, American Revolution, and founding of US.', 'https://example.com/video/colonial', 'Colonial America Guide', 'Analyze founding documents', 9), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Civil War and Reconstruction', 'Study Civil War causes, course, and Reconstruction policies.', 'https://example.com/video/civil-war', 'Civil War Reference', 'Analyze Civil War events', 10), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Modern America (1900-Present)', 'Explore 20th and 21st century American history.', 'https://example.com/video/modern', 'Modern America Guide', 'Analyze 20th century events', 11), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Constitutional Rights and Amendments', 'Learn about constitutional rights and amendments.', 'https://example.com/video/constitution', 'Constitutional Rights Reference', 'Analyze amendments', 12), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL'), 'Branches of Government', 'Understand executive, legislative, and judicial branches.', 'https://example.com/video/branches', 'Government Structure Guide', 'Explain government functions', 13);
